name: openoutreach
description: An AI-powered tool designed to automate LinkedIn outreach by finding and generating leads, enabling users to describe their product and define their target market while the AI identifies potential prospects.

inputs.name: product_description
inputs.description: A detailed description of the user's product or service.

inputs.name: target_market
inputs.description: Definition or characteristics of the target audience or market segment.

inputs.name: user_linkedin_credentials
inputs.description: Authentication details to access the user's LinkedIn account for automation.

inputs.name: lead_criteria_filters
inputs.description: Optional filters specifying lead attributes like industry, location, job title, etc.

outputs.name: lead_list
outputs.description: A list of potential leads with relevant LinkedIn profile information.

outputs.name: outreach_actions
outputs.description: Automated actions such as connection requests, messages, or follow-ups performed on LinkedIn.

outputs.name: report
outputs.description: Summary report of the outreach campaign including number of leads found, connections made, and response rates.

steps: User inputs product description and defines the target market
AI analyzes input to identify potential leads matching the criteria
System fetches LinkedIn profiles and compiles a lead list
Automated outreach actions (connection requests, messages) are executed
Campaign progress and results are monitored and reported to the user
use_cases: Sales teams generating targeted leads on LinkedIn for outbound marketing
Entrepreneurs and SMBs automating LinkedIn outreach to potential customers
Recruiters sourcing candidates matching specific job requirements
Marketing agencies running LinkedIn campaigns for client acquisition
patterns: AI lead identification based on product and target market description
Automated LinkedIn connection and messaging workflow
User input prompt for defining marketing targets combined with AI-based prospecting
Scheduled or event-driven outreach to improve lead engagement

prompt_templates.name: define_product_and_market
prompt_templates.template: Describe your product in detail: {product_description}. Define your target market: {target_market}.

prompt_templates.name: initiate_lead_generation
prompt_templates.template: Find leads on LinkedIn that match the product and market description provided.

prompt_templates.name: send_connection_request
prompt_templates.template: Send a personalized connection request to {lead_name} highlighting the value of {product_description}.

prompt_templates.name: follow_up_message
prompt_templates.template: Send a follow-up message to {lead_name} referencing previous outreach and inviting engagement.
